2026-05-28CIRNACYukon ActRelinquishement of the administration and control from the Commissioner of Yukon Order approving the relinquishment in perpetuity, by the Commissioner of Yukon, of the administration and control of the public real property known as the Clinton Creek Mine Site, located near Dawson City, Yukon and transfer of the administration of this property to the Minister of Northern Affairs.N/A
subject: Relinquishement of the administration and control from the Commissioner of Yukon
precis: Order approving the relinquishment in perpetuity, by the Commissioner of Yukon, of the administration and control of the public real property known as the Clinton Creek Mine Site, located near Dawson City, Yukon and transfer of the administration of this property to the Minister of Northern Affairs.
